text:
SAS Name
 Variable Name

 BENE_ID 
 Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID 

 PRACTICE_ID 
 Model-Assigned Practice ID 

 PRACTICE_NAME 
 Name of Practice 

 TIN 
 Practice's Taxpayer Identification Number 

 UNIQUE_PATIENT_ID 
 Unique Model-Assigned Patient ID 

 NPI 
 Provider's National Provider Identifier 

 VISIT_DATE 
 Patient Visit Date 

 FOLLOWUP_ATTESTATION

 ACCURACY_ATTESTATION

 RISK_SCORE
